metadata.title: Query all the things
metadata.description: Query all the things Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: info
ast.source: Layout ready, registering for vault events
ast.target: 布局就绪，正在注册库事件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Dropping the dataview_tasks table to repopulate.
ast.target: 正在删除 dataview_tasks 表以重新填充。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Dropping the tasks table to repopulate.
ast.target: 正在删除 tasks 表以重新填充。

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在设置内置的 Handlebars 辅助函数

ast.name: info
ast.source: Layout is ready, starting core setup.
ast.target: 布局就绪，开始核心设置。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Layout is ready, starting cache loading.
ast.target: 布局就绪，开始加载缓存。

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在添加以下版本的发布说明：

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在运行启动时的 SQL 查询

ast.name: info
ast.target: 启动时的 SQL 查询结果

ast.name: log
ast.source: It looks like you are using the browser version of AlaSQL. Please use the alasql.fs.js file instead.
ast.target: 看起来您正在使用 AlaSQL 的浏览器版本。请改用 alasql.fs.js 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set to true, the codeblock will be replaced with the render result. If set to false, the render result will replace the codeblock
ast.target: 如果设置为 true，代码块将被渲染结果替换。如果设置为 false，渲染结果将替换代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 'info' by default, det to 'debug' to see more detailed logs'
ast.target: 默认为 'info'，设置为 'debug' 可查看更详细的日志。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Indexing notes for Query All The Things...
ast.target: 正在为 Query All The Things 索引笔记...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: CustomJS plugin is not installed. Referencing custom scripts in your query blocks will not work.
ast.target: CustomJS 插件未安装。在查询块中引用自定义脚本将无法工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the files you want added on load, one per line. The table name will be the name of the file minus the extension.
ast.target: 添加您希望在加载时添加的文件，每行一个。表名将是文件名减去扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This enabled processing of any DataView Inline properties added to a task. The name of the property is added to the obsidian_markdown_tasks table as a column. Restart Obsidian to re-cache all files.
ast.target: 这将启用对添加到任务的任何 DataView 内联属性的处理。该属性的名称将作为列添加到 obsidian_markdown_tasks 表中。请重启 Obsidian 以重新缓存所有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables the continual notifications that the index is being updated. Only two messages will be created, one on start and one on end.
ast.target: 禁用索引正在更新的持续通知。只会创建两条消息，一条在开始时，一条在结束时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the files you want added on load, one per line. The table name will be the name of the file minus the extension. Only a markdown table should exist on the page.
ast.target: 添加您希望在加载时添加的文件，每行一个。表名将是文件名减去扩展名。页面上应仅存在一个 Markdown 表格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the files you want added on load, one per line. The SQL commands will be executed in order. Use a ";" to separate commands.
ast.target: 添加您希望在加载时添加的文件，每行一个。SQL 命令将按顺序执行。使用 \";\" 分隔命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The root directory for the query files. This is the directory where the query files are stored. If this is not set the path must be relative to the root of the vault.
ast.target: 查询文件的根目录。这是存储查询文件的目录。如果未设置，路径必须相对于库的根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This disables the debounce on query execution, queries will run more often.
ast.target: 这将禁用查询执行的防抖，查询将更频繁地运行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The time to wait until queries will run while a user is updating the vault.
ast.target: 在用户更新库期间，等待查询运行的时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This allows use of an alternative way to render the results in Obsidian using a different method. This is experimental and may not work as expected.
ast.target: 这允许使用一种替代方法在 Obsidian 中渲染结果。这是实验性的，可能无法按预期工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will enable a button on the code block to allow you to edit the settings for the block. This is experimental and may not work as expected.
ast.target: 这将在代码块上启用一个按钮，允许您编辑该块的设置。这是实验性的，可能无法按预期工作。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 使用可选分隔符连接数组

ast.name: description
ast.target: 获取最近更改的 5 条笔记

ast.name: description
ast.target: 显示页面路径详情的函数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Capitalize the first letter of the string
ast.target: 将字符串的首字母大写

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start markdown code block with optional type
ast.target: 以可选类型开始 Markdown 代码块

ast.name: description
ast.source: If you want to see a notification when the plugin is updated.
ast.target: 如果您希望在插件更新时收到通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number of rows to show when dumping the internal logging to the console.
ast.target: 将内部日志转储到控制台时显示的行数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables the Dataview plugin missing notification.
ast.target: 禁用 Dataview 插件缺失通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables the CustomJS plugin missing notification.
ast.target: 禁用 CustomJS 插件缺失通知。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 引号字段上的尾随引号格式错误

ast.name: name
ast.source: Report the metrics for the plugin to the console
ast.target: 将插件的指标报告到控制台

ast.name: name
ast.source: Report the metrics for the plugin to the editor
ast.target: 将插件的指标报告到编辑器

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force a refresh of all blocks for QATT
ast.target: 强制刷新 QATT 的所有区块

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force the notes cache to be reloaded
ast.target: 强制重新加载笔记缓存

ast.name: name
ast.source: Will push all the internal events to the console for debugging.
ast.target: 将所有内部事件推送到控制台以进行调试。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Will push all the internal obsidian_markdown_tasks table to the console for debugging.
ast.target: 将所有内部 obsidian_markdown_tasks 表推送到控制台以进行调试。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Will push all the internal obsidian_markdown_lists table to the console for debugging.
ast.target: 将所有内部 obsidian_markdown_lists 表推送到控制台以进行调试。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Will push all the internal qatt.ReferenceCalendar table to the console for debugging.
ast.target: 将所有内部 qatt.ReferenceCalendar 表推送到控制台以进行调试。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Will push all the internal qatt.ReferenceCalendar table to the editor for debugging.
ast.target: 将所有内部 qatt.ReferenceCalendar 表推送到编辑器以进行调试。
